title: Server location European users
excerpt:
Dear Monday Team, 
I have not found a recent input on where your servers for the European community ist located. We are a tax consultancy and it is important that our data is stored in Europe. 
Best Anja

posts.author: anja.pantucek (Anja)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear Monday Team,

I have not found a recent input on where your servers for the European community ist located. We are a tax consultancy and it is important that our data is stored in Europe.
Best Anja
